name: Blueberry Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Retained liquid from the can of blueberries
recipeInstructions:
1. In order listed, add all dry ingredients into a bowl.
2. Put the well-drained berries into a 2-cup measuring cup. Add 1/4 cup of retained juice and enough water to equal 1 1/3 cups (about 1/4 cup water).
3. Select white bread on your bread machine and press Start. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature.
4. After the second kneading cycle, remove the dough from the machine and divide it into two equal portions. Place each portion in small loaf pans.
5. Cover and let rise for double the size, about 45 minutes to 1 hour.
6. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
